description_long: This is an L-shaped office desk with a light wood finish and sturdy metal legs, designed to fit into a corner workspace. The desk features a raised privacy panel along the back and side, providing separation from adjacent workspaces. On the desktop, there is a computer monitor with a keyboard and mouse, a desk lamp, a telephone, and a printer, all arranged for efficient workflow. The surface is spacious, allowing for multiple devices and paperwork, while the open leg space beneath ensures comfort for a seated user. The desk's construction appears robust, with a combination of wood and metal materials, and the overall design is modern and functional. The attached privacy panels and cable management cutouts suggest it is intended for professional or administrative environments.
description: A modern L-shaped office desk with privacy panels, metal legs, and a spacious wood surface equipped for computer work.
description_view_0: The desk is seen from the user-facing side, showing the computer, lamp, phone, and printer on the L-shaped surface, with privacy panels at the back and side.
description_view_1: Viewed from behind the privacy panel, the back of the monitor and printer are visible, and the desk's L-shape and panel height are emphasized.
description_view_2: A side view highlights the length of the privacy panel and the arrangement of the desktop items, with the monitor and printer aligned along the back edge.
description_view_3: From the opposite user-facing angle, the full L-shape is visible, with the printer and lamp on the left and the computer setup on the right.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is open, with the privacy panels forming the back and left side; the computer and keyboard are positioned on the main surface facing the user.
